docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2006 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-26-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 613, ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMANTE, SALVACION JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-26-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-21-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMANTE, SALVACION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 943 ATHENS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CALIFORNIA $617.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $617.00, DEFENDANT MAY OCCUPY PREMISES RENT FREE THROUGH FEB. 28, 2007 AND MUST VACATE NO LATER THAN 5:00 P.M. FEB. 28, 2007. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME HE SHALL PAY RENT FOR JANUARY AND FEBRUARY 2007, PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION AND DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE ENTITLED TO STAY OF EXECUTION OF THE WRIT. SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
COURT TRIAL ON DEC-26-2006 HELD, COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT ENTERED DEC. 28, 2006 JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR 7489, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, DEPT. 613.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMANTE, SALVACION AS TO DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMANTE, SALVACION SERVED NOV-16-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON DEC-26-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
TRIAL COMMENCED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR 7489, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, DEPT. 613
TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN ONE DAY.JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: NOT REPORTED, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, DEPT. 613
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-21-2006. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CLERKS R.PASCUAL & M.JONES, NOT REPORTED.

COURT TRIAL ON DEC-26-2006. COURT HEARD TESTIMONY FROM RESPECTIVE PARTIES IN PROPRIA PERSONA AND REVIEWED DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. THE MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON DEC. 26, 2006 BY ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BERJAMIN, EMMANUEL
